content:
# Recommendations — after iter-022

## CRITICAL — DO NOT re-`prove` `hcompat`; change the substrate (route-shift, must-fix)
`pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion` `hcompat` (L4257) is **STUCK on a carrier diamond**, not a
math gap. The recon022 mate calculus is fully derived and correct (see L4208–4257 + `informal/pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion.md`).
The blocker: `pushforward β`/`hadj` are typed over `X/Y.ringCatSheaf.obj`; `pullback φ'`/`adj` over
`(_ ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat)`. `PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory` is keyed on the latter, so
`MonoidalCategory (PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj)` is NOT synthesizable; a single `μ_natural`/
`IsMonoidal` step cannot reconcile the two defeq-but-not-syntactic instances. Empirically exhausted this
iter: `inferInstanceAs` (eta→noncomputable aux-def errors), direct-constant `letI` (elaborates the easy
`have`s but `μ_natural`/`IsMonoidal` still fail), explicit `…Struct` letIs (no effect), `haveI` (worse —
breaks `monβ` defeq), `noncomputable lemma` (rejected). **This is the 5th iter (018→022) of brick-transform
with no sorry elimination — the planner's "iters-left ~1, route de-risked" estimate has now missed for the
3rd time on this brick.** Assign a SUBSTRATE change, not another tactic round:

- **Route 2 (recommended first — cheapest, focused).** Good-form scaffold: restate `β`/`hadj`/`H1`/`μIsoβ`
  over `(_ ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat)` so the whole reduction is single-form and the global
  `monoidalCategory` instance applies directly. **Verified risk (this iter):** `PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj`
  takes its structure maps over the ring-*sheaf* `.obj` presheaves, forcing `β` into the `ringCatSheaf.obj`
  form; the H1/H2 `ext` proofs use `f.app_appIso_inv` (ring-sheaf-keyed). A *defeq ascription* of `β` to the
  good form is **untested** — try it in a tight focused lane before route 1. (Mode: `prove`, but the goal is a
  restatement of the scaffold, not re-deriving the mate calculus.)
- **Route 1 (fallback — `refactor`/`mathlib-build` scale).** Re-key the carrier: expose
  `MonoidalCategory`/`MonoidalCategoryStruct` on `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj` so BOTH spellings
  resolve to the *same* term (no diamond). Memory: a naive top-level instance is kernel-rejected (ARCHON_MEMORY);
  the kernel-accepted spelling (reducibility plumbing on `ringCatSheaf.obj`, or a `MonoidalCategory.ofTensorHom`
  re-export) must be found. Consider `effort-breaker`/`mathlib-analogist` (cross-domain) on "re-keying a
  defeq-but-non-syntactic typeclass carrier" before committing prover time.

Either way: do NOT re-send the recon022 `prove` recipe verbatim — it is exhausted at the instance layer.

## HIGH — stale `.lean` comments misdirect the prover (next-prover recs; review cannot edit `.lean`)
From aud022 (`task_results/lean-auditor-aud022.md`). The header attributes the live sorry to the WRONG decl,
which actively misleads:
- **L44–46, L159:** header/sub-module layout say sorry #2 is in `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` (D4′) at
  `~L4001`. WRONG: D4′ body is **closed**; the sorry is in the private helper `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion`
  (K1) at **L4257**; `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` is at L4326 and sorry-free in its own body. Also
  `exists_tensorObj_inverse` is at L712/734, not `~L697`. **Fix the header attribution next prover touch.**
- **L4220:** K1 comment "COMPLETE MATE-CALCULUS REDUCTION" / "VERIFIED to elaborate" / `he := rfl` / "NOT a
  mathematical gap" overstates adjacent to a `sorry`. Trim to: math route mapped; live blocker = carrier diamond;
  `hadj.IsMonoidal` still an open obligation.
- **L3266–3330** (D3′ iter-019 strategy block — proof closed at L3344) and **L4005–4090** (D4′ iter-020 strategy
  block — no K1 mention): stale active-strategy blocks above closed proofs. Remove or annotate CLOSED.

## MEDIUM — dead code (next structural/cleanup touch)
- **L1266–1271** `section PullbackLanDecomposition`: only `variable`s, no declarations; comment claims a
  "reusable decomposition" that was never built. Vestige of the abandoned general-`f` build. Remove.
- **L929** `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`: fully proved, correct, but no code consumer (intended Phase-2 consumer
  abandoned). Keep only if a route 2 restatement will use it; else remove.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign
- `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L734): import-cycle gated; needs a `refactor`-MOVE downstream of DualInverse
  (RelPicFunctor sole code consumer). Architectural, not a proof task. Serialize AFTER K1 (both touch
  `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` — parallel writes conflict).

## Coverage debt (unchanged — no new helpers this iter)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 105 `lean_aux` nodes (stable; the iter-022 reduction `have`s were reverted to
documentation, so no new uncovered decls). Standing carry-over from prior iters — the planner should keep
chipping blueprint entries for the helper cone (`comp_forget_cocycle`, `inv_telescope`, `cocycle_assemble`,
`sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv`, `adj_unit_map_counit`, etc.). Not introduced this session.
